zh.lifeSummary: 當John Holmes Sr於1403年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾金斯頓 武朋 赫爾時，他的父親William Holme Of Paull Holme23歲，母親Joan Marflet19歲。他於從1419年到1429年與Elizabeth Wastneys在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1438年9月在他的家鄉享年35歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾金斯頓 武朋 赫爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Holmes Sr于1403年出生在英国英格兰越可爾金斯頓 武朋 赫爾时，他的父亲William Holme Of Paull Holme23岁，母亲Joan Marflet19岁。他于从1419年到1429年与Elizabeth Wastneys在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1438年9月在他的家乡享年35岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾金斯頓 武朋 赫爾。

nameMeanings.name: Holmes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: either from the plural form of Holme , or else a variant of Holme or Home , with excrescent -s (see Holm ).

Scottish: probably a habitational name from Holmes near Dundonald (Ayrshire), or possibly from another place so called in the barony of Inchestuir (Angus). Both placenames likely derive from the plural form of Middle English, Older Scots holm ‘islet, raised land in a marsh’ (see Holm ).

Scottish and Irish: adopted for Scottish Gaelic and Irish Mac Thómais, Mac Thómais (see McComb ). In parts of western Ireland, Holmes is also a variant of Cavish, from Gaelic Mac Thámhais, another patronymic from Thomas . Early bearers in Ireland were probably immigrants from Scotland.

variants.name: Holme
meanings: English (northwestern England): variant of   Holm   and of   Home   3 and 4.
Danish and Swedish: variant of   Holm   1.

variants.name: Homes
meanings: English: variant of   Holmes   and   Home  .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When John Holmes Sr was born in 1403, in Kingston upon Hull, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Holme Of Paull Holme, was 23 and his mother, Joan Marflet, was 19. He married Elizabeth Wastneys from 1419 to 1429, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in September 1438, in his hometown, at the age of 35, and was buried in Kingston upon Hull, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Holmes Sr est né en 1403, à Kingston upon Hull, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Holme Of Paull Holme, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Joan Marflet, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Wastneys du 1419 au 1429, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en septembre 1438, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterré à Kingston upon Hull, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Holmes Sr 1403 in Kingston upon Hull, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Holme Of Paull Holme 23 und seine Mutter Joan Marflet 19. Er hat von 1419 bis 1429 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Wastneys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb im September 1438 im Alter von 35 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Kingston upon Hull, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Holmes Sr è nato il nel 1403 nel Kingston upon Hull, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Holme Of Paull Holme, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Joan Marflet, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Wastneys da 1419 a 1429, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: John Holmes Srが1403年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアキングストン ウプオン ハルで生まれた時，父William Holme Of Paull Holmeは23歳，母Joan Marfletは19歳であった。から1419年まで1429年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでElizabeth Wastneysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1438年9月に故郷で35歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアキングストン ウプオン ハルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Holmes Sr(이)가 1403년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 킨그스턴 업 훌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Holme Of Paull Holme(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Marflet(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1419년 부터 1429년 까지 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Elizabeth Wastneys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1438년 9월 그의 고향에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 킨그스턴 업 훌에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Holmes Sr nasceu em 1403, em Kingston upon Hull, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Holme Of Paull Holme, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Joan Marflet, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Wastneys de 1419 a 1429, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em setembro de 1438, em sua cidade natal, com 35 anos, e foi sepultado em Kingston upon Hull, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Holmes Sr родился в 1403 г. в местности кингстон упон хулл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Holme Of Paull Holme было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Marflet, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Wastneys с 1419 по 1429 в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер сентябрь 1438 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 35 лет и был похоронен в местности кингстон упон хулл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
